# Premium-governance tests that must be both discovered and executed in CI.
authored_parameter_policy_matches_preview_and_records_runtime_decisions
authored_approval_resumes_exactly_one_execution
action_gate_approval_resumes_exactly_one_execution
approved_egress_receipt_authorizes_exactly_one_retry
egress_approval_is_bound_to_exact_arguments
concurrent_egress_retries_consume_one_receipt_atomically
governance_approval_approve_rejects_agent_reviewer
governance_approval_rejects_agent_self_review
